buildCommand: flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --base-href /app/ && mkdir -p build/temp_app && mv build/web/* build/temp_app/ && mkdir -p build/web/app && mv build/temp_app/* build/web/app/ && cp -r website/* build/web/
installCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable && flutter/bin/flutter doctor && flutter/bin/flutter pub get
